title: Sustuff | 3 Bamboo Toothbrushes with Medium Plant-Based Bristles | Reusable, Recycled and Plastic-Free Handle (Jungle Green) Travel Toothbrush
features: PACK OF 3 BAMBOO TOOTHBRUSH HEADS - Each plastic-free box contains 3 toothbrush heads with each handle, for savings in cost, convenience and emissions from otherwise-separate deliveries.
SUSTAINABLE BAMBOO - Head stems made from FSC-certified sustainably sourced 100% biodegradable bamboo.
PLANT-BASED BRISTLES - Our bristles are made with castor-oil plants instead of traditional fossil-fuel oil for renewable sources with reduced emissions that are offset by natural plant growth.
MOULD-FREE & LONG-LASTING HANDLE - 100% Recycled, sleek aluminium handle that will last a lifetime and can be recycled again if needed. Plus, they don't get mouldy like bamboo when left in a wet cup!
REDUCE WASTE - Toothbrush head replacements that use only 25%* the bamboo of a full bamboo toothbrush, so 75% of the natural land is saved from deforestation and cultivation.
TRAVEL-FRIENDLY - Instead of packing multiple manual toothbrushes, you can carry one handle and several heads. This is especially useful for long travel or when traveling with limited baggage.
description: Product Description Bamboo toothbrushes that don't go mouldy and reduce plastic Less waste, more nature By keeping the recycled aluminium handle and only replacing the plant heads at the end of the toothbrush life, this toothbrush uses 75% * less bamboo material and produces far less waste as a result. This means a reduced need of deforestation and land by 75% for cultivation, while keeping more of our natural landscapes . Pack of 3 Why get one toothbrush when you can have three ? With an additional two spare toothbrush head refills in the plastic-free package, each pack lasts you three times as long . Plant-based bristles and heads If a toothbrush must be disposable at some point, isn't it better if it can be grown again for a replacement ? Plant-based heads, with a body made from sustainably-sourced bamboo and the bio-based bristles produced from castor oil/bean plants . Mould-free handle A sleek , fitted accessory made from recycled aluminium drinks cans, which will last forever and can be recycled again and again if needed. Plus, it doesn't get mouldy like bamboo when left in a wet cup! An alternative to plastic toothbrushes A toothbrush that will give you something to smile about . If your bamboo head breaks during use, please let us know and we'll get back to you with a resolution. Similarly, wood can be subject to mould under certain storage conditions. If you find your bamboo toothbrush head contains mould at reception of your order please get in touch with us as soon as possible.
